司令官君。最近、働きすぎじゃないか？<br>あそこで一緒に日向ぼっこでもして休も:
Commander-kun. Don't you think you've been overworking lately?
Let's rest over there and get some sun together.
え？ 昨日、休みだったから大丈夫、だと――？: Hm? Yesterday was a day off so you're fine?
たったの１日休んだくらいで回復するわけないじゃないか。<br>あと４年――いや、:
One day off is nowhere near enough to recover.
Another four years — no, ten years of rest is in order.
まったく。君たち人間は頑張りすぎだ。そんなところが大好きだし、尊敬も<br>して:
Honestly. Humans push too hard. I love that about you, but there
are limits. Here — a lap pillow. Come.
ふふ……よしよし。素直でいい子だ。このまま３日くらいは私の膝の上で<br>ゆっく:
Hehe... there, there. Good boy. Feel free to rest
here for 3 days — a special service just for you.
